/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -std=c++14 -O3 -std=c++14 -pthread -std=c++0x -std=c++14 -fexceptions  -O3 -DNDEBUG   -shared -Wl,-soname,libgmock_main.so -o ../lib/libgmock_main.so CMakeFiles/gmock_main.dir/src/gmock_main.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/apple-pie/SLAM/fr-lio/codes/frlio/ros_app/build/gtest/lib ../lib/libgmock.so ../lib/libgtest.so -lpthread
